man.description: A middle-aged bearded Slavic peasant woodcutter from the Pripyat marshes: weathered face, shaggy dark hair and a full beard, wearing a rough belted wool coat over a tunic, cloth leg-wraps and bast shoes, carrying a single worn short-handled firewood axe resting over one shoulder. An ordinary, tired, mortal man.

wife.description: The woodcutter's wife, a mid-adult Slavic peasant woman: hair fully covered by a headscarf (platok), wearing a long linen dress with an apron, a calm plain face. A loom-worker. Keep the exact face shown in the reference images.

leshy.description: The Leshy, a colossal Slavic forest spirit: a towering humanoid formed of dark bark, moss and shadow, crowned with great branching antlers, its eyes two faint green embers. No wings, no clothing, part-tree and part-giant, ancient and looming.
